who: CFOs of accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For CFOs of accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month, inconsistent financial reporting causes delayed decision-making. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent financial reporting leads to delayed decision-making.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where CFOs seek help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on workflows
DM outreach to CFOs with a demo video
Community forums where CFOs share tools
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates and scheduled delivery on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
